title: Maximo Integration

posts.author: dmenaker (Dave Menaker)
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering if anyone has built any integrations to IBM Maximo. We’ve come up with a solution using a webhook and the API, but it doesn’t do everything we want, so we have a multiple step process. We could build a custom action, but it’s not in the plan for now.
